llm_output:
{
  "q1": {
    "verdict": "MALICIOUS",
    "explanation": "The sample exhibits multiple high-confidence indicators of malware. It performs keylogging via polling, captures screenshots and webcam images, reads clipboard data, and encrypts data using multiple algorithms (DES, RC4, RC6, 3DES). It also employs anti-analysis techniques such as debugger detection, delayed execution, and obfuscation (XOR, Base64, stack strings). The combination of data exfiltration capabilities (clipboard, screen, webcam) and encryption strongly suggests a spyware or ransomware payload."
  },
  "q2": {
    "family": ["Spyware", "Ransomware"],
    "explanation": "The sample demonstrates clear spyware behavior by logging keystrokes, capturing screenshots, reading the clipboard, and accessing the webcam. Simultaneously, it exhibits ransomware characteristics by encrypting data using multiple cryptographic algorithms (DES, RC4, RC6, 3DES). The dual nature of data theft and encryption justifies both classifications."
  },
